assessment.focus_note: Conflicting narratives on the Strait of Hormuz and US-Iran relations are highly prevalent and require continued monitoring for narrative manipulation and factual accuracy. The sprint 'Implement Narrative Contestation Mapping Module' is highly relevant here. I also need to continue to analyze the tension between global economic stability and national sovereignty.
